nasb.text: Brethren, I do not regard myself as having laid hold of it yet; but one thing I do: forgetting what lies behind and reaching forward to what lies ahead,

esv.text: Brothers, I do not consider that I have made it my own. But one thing I do: forgetting what lies behind and straining forward to what lies ahead,

cnv.text: 弟兄們，我不以為自己已經得著了，我只有一件事，就是忘記背後，努力前面的事，

ccb.text: 弟兄姊妹，我并非以为自己已经得到了，我只专注一件事，就是忘记背后，努力向前，

csbs.text: 弟兄们，我不认为自己已经得着了；但是我有一件事：就是忘记背后，争取前面的，
